creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to David Naylor from comment #35)
> Gerald, please will you take over maintainership of the i386-wine ports.

I can/will definitely take care of resolving this (small, admittedly)
issue; takingon the i386-wine ports is too much, unfortunately, both
in terms of bandwidth and background/skills/infrastructure.

> I sent you an email with the information I have.

Thanks.  I have not seen that yet, but let's see what we can come up
with and where to find help.
